title: jacquemontia obtusata
intro: Jacquemontia obtusata, also known as the pointed morning glory, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Jacquemontia obtusata include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
